name: Amaretto Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and molasses.
2. Add eggs, ground almonds, lemon rind, and almond extract to the butter mixture; mix well.
3. Stir in Amaretto alternately with flour.
4. Drop by spoonfuls onto un-oiled cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes. The cookies will be golden brown when done.
